LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HENRY GIAO'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING AND SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT IS VACATED AND DEFENDANT MAY FILE ITS PROPOSED ANSWER ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 2, 2010. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF $500 AS REASONABLE EXPENSES FOR OBTAINING THE DEFAULT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
